name: Ubiquiti SmartPower Cable
title: Ubiquiti SmartPower Cable
title_extended: Ubiquiti SmartPower Cable - UniFi SmartPower Cable, 1.5m
description: The Ubiquiti SmartPower Cable (USP-Cable) is designed to provide redundant power delivery between compatible SmartPower devices within the UniFi ecosystem. It enables seamless backup power connectivity, helping maintain continuous operation of critical network infrastructure during power interruptions or unexpected failures.

detailed_description.heading: Power Backup Cable
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti SmartPower Cable (USP-Cable) is designed to provide redundant power delivery between compatible SmartPower devices within the UniFi ecosystem. It enables seamless backup power connectivity, helping maintain continuous operation of critical network infrastructure during power interruptions or unexpected failures. Built specifically to support UniFi SmartPower connectivity, this cable allows connected devices to automatically receive backup power from an associated SmartPower system without requiring manual intervention. With a practical cable length of 1.5 meters, the USP-Cable offers flexible installation options while maintaining tidy and organized rack or cabinet layouts.

detailed_description.heading: NDAA Compliance and Resilience
detailed_description.text: The design ensures a secure and stable connection between SmartPower components, helping reduce downtime risks caused by single power source failures. The cable is fully NDAA compliant, making it suitable for deployments in regulated industries and government-related environments where compliance standards are required. Its construction is tailored for professional networking environments where reliability and consistency are critical. By integrating easily into UniFi SmartPower systems, the USP-Cable enhances network resilience without adding complexity to deployment. It provides a straightforward yet essential layer of redundancy, ensuring that connected equipment continues operating smoothly even when primary power conditions are compromised.

detailed_description.heading: Reliable Materials
detailed_description.text: The USP-Cable is engineered with durable materials to ensure long-term reliability in professional networking environments. The internal conductor structure includes eighteen 16 AWG wires and six 24 AWG wires, providing stable power transmission across connected SmartPower devices. Each conductor is protected by insulation with a thickness of 0.35 mm and an individual diameter of 2 mm, manufactured from high-quality PVC to ensure electrical safety and mechanical durability. This insulation design helps maintain consistent performance while protecting the conductors from wear or environmental stress.

detailed_description.heading: Durable Construction
detailed_description.text: The outer cable jacket is also constructed from PVC, offering additional protection against physical damage during installation and operation. With an external jacket size of 9.5 x 23 mm, the cable maintains a balanced profile that combines flexibility with structural strength. This construction supports reliable operation in professional installations where cables may be routed through racks, cabinets, or structured pathways. The materials used are selected to maintain durability while preserving ease of handling during deployment. Together, these design elements ensure that the USP-Cable delivers dependable redundant power connectivity while maintaining structural integrity over time, making it suitable for demanding networking environments.
